steps.title: Set the equations equal
steps.content:
At an intersection point, the two $y$-values are equal:
$$
(x-2)^2=4x-12
$$
Expand and rearrange:
$$
x^2-4x+4=4x-12
$$
$$
x^2-8x+16=0
$$

steps.title: Find the y-coordinate
steps.content: Factor and solve for $x$: $$ (x-4)^2=0 $$ Substitute into the line equation: $$ y=4(4)-12 $$ The answer is 4.
